Alberto Sordi, a male Italian actor, is buried at Campo Verano, a site designated as Italian national heritage and located in Italy. Sordi was affiliated with the I Vitelloni Club Alberto Sordi, an organization founded and managed by Stefano Saliola, a male individual whose family name, Saliola, is written in the Latin script. The name "Stefano" is also written in the Latin script and was attested in the "frequency of first names in the Netherlands, 2010," a ranked list published by the Nederlandse Voornamenbank. This database, maintained by the Meertens Institute, focuses on given names and originates from the Kingdom of the Netherlands.

The Netherlands, whose capital is Amsterdam and central bank is De Nederlandsche Bank, is also the country associated with the Canon of Dutch History, which partially coincides with canonvannederland.nl. The Canon of Dutch History inspired the Canon of Flanders, a work commissioned by the Flemish Government, headquartered in Place des Martyrs - Martelaarsplein and applying to Flanders, Belgium. The Flemish Government operates in Dutch, a language practiced by Dutch language specialists.

Italy, where Campo Verano is located, has Sergio Mattarella as its head of state. Mattarella, a male native Italian speaker, resides in the Quirinal Palace in Rome and carries the family name Mattarella, also written in the Latin script. The Valley of the Kings, located in Egypt, is renowned for housing significant tombs, including that of Tutankhamun.

The Twentieth Dynasty of Egypt, to which Baketwernel belonged, was succeeded by the Twenty-first Dynasty, marking the beginning of the Third Intermediate Period of Egypt. This period, a significant era in the history of ancient Egypt, was characterized by the official religion of ancient Egypt, which originated in the Land of Punt. The Third Intermediate Period eventually gave way to the Twenty-second Dynasty, followed by the Twenty-third and Twenty-fourth Dynasties, each playing a crucial role in the unfolding of Egypt's rich history.

Ancient Egypt, a civilization studied extensively through the field of Egyptology, has left an indelible mark on history. Egyptology encompasses various sub-disciplines, including papyrology, the study of ancient papyri, which is practiced by papyrologists. Papyrology is detailed in the *Dictionary of Biblical Criticism and Interpretation (2007 ed.)*, an English-language work published in New York City, edited by Stanley E. Porter, and focused on biblical criticism.

Modern Egypt, the successor to Ancient Egypt, is governed by the Parliament of Egypt, a bicameral legislature, and its highest judicial authority is the Supreme Constitutional Court of Egypt. The court's architectural style reflects Egyptian Revival architecture, a part of the broader cultural phenomenon known as Egyptomania, which also includes Tutmania, a fascination with the tomb of Tutankhamun. Egyptomania is deeply intertwined with the legacy of Ancient Egypt, a civilization that continues to captivate scholars and enthusiasts alike.

Herman Li is a musician known for playing the guitar, an instrument that falls partially within the category of electro-acoustic chordophones according to MIMO's classification of musical instruments. This classification, based on the Hornbostel–Sachs system, was revised by the MIMO Consortium and includes instruments like the bell. The Hornbostel–Sachs system itself draws inspiration from the Natya Shastra, a text on Indian classical drama, and the work of Victor-Charles Mahillon, a music scholar whose collections are housed in the Vleeshuis.

The guitar has been prominently featured in the video game series *Guitar Hero*, which has a USK 6 rating. The USK rating system, managed by the Unterhaltungssoftware Selbstkontrolle, is headquartered in Berlin, Germany. The USK 6 rating follows USK 0 and is followed by USK 12, which in turn precedes USK 16. All these ratings are part of the Unterhaltungssoftware Selbstkontrolle's classification system.

Interestingly, the guitar received the "Instrument of the Year" award, an honor originating in Germany. Germany is also known for its national coat of arms, the *Coat of arms of Germany*, which is in the public domain. The country's head of government is Friedrich Merz, who is related to Josef Paul Sauvigny, a politician and member of the Sturmabteilung. Josef Paul Sauvigny, who spoke German, was the father of Paula Merz and the grandfather of Philippe Merz, a male citizen of Germany and the son of Friedrich Merz. 

This interconnected web of relationships and classifications highlights the cultural and historical significance of the guitar and its broader connections to music, gaming, and German society.

Fidel Castro held the military rank of Commandant, which is equivalent to the rank of Commander. In the military hierarchy, the rank of Commandant is positioned between Capitaine (Captain) and Lieutenant-Colonel. The NATO code for the Commandant rank is OF-3. The Lieutenant-Colonel rank, which is one level above Commandant, is classified as OF-4 in the NATO grading system and is a recognized military rank in France.

The NATO grading system for military ranks is structured hierarchically. OF-3 is immediately below OF-4, which is followed by OF-5, and so on, up to OF-7. The lowest NATO code, OF-D, represents a Student Officer and is followed by OF-1, which progresses up to OF-2, OF-3, and beyond. This system provides a standardized way to compare military ranks across NATO member countries.

In the context of naval ranks, the rank of Commander follows Luitenant ter Zee der Eerste Klasse and is followed by Kapitein-ter-Zee. The Kapitein-ter-Zee rank, equivalent to OF-5 in the NATO system, is followed by Commodore, which is classified as OF-6. These ranks are part of the military structure in the Kingdom of the Netherlands, a constitutional monarchy with its capital in Amsterdam. The naval rank hierarchy in the Netherlands includes Luitenant ter Zee der 2e Klasse Oudste Categorie, which follows Luitenant ter Zee der 2de Klasse Jongste Categorie and is followed by Luitenant ter Zee der Eerste Klasse. The Capitaine rank in France corresponds to OF-2 in the NATO system.

This interconnected structure of military ranks and their NATO codes, along with the governmental and historical context of France and the Kingdom of the Netherlands, provides a comprehensive overview of the relationships and entities described in the knowledge graph.

The position of *adelantado* was associated with the *adelantamiento*, an administrative body in the Crown of Castile, which later became the Kingdom of Spain. Mike Fitzpatrick was a human and a citizen of the United States who passed away due to natural causes. He was recognized for his achievements in scouting, having received the prestigious Eagle Scout award, which is the highest rank in the Boy Scouts of America, based in the United States. The rank below Eagle Scout is Life Scout, which is also conferred by Scouting America, an organization dedicated to scouting. Scouting itself originated in England and was founded by Robert Baden-Powell, 1st Baron Baden-Powell, who was born in Paddington and was the son of Henrietta Grace Smyth. Notably, Baden-Powell was nominated for the Nobel Peace Prize. The scouting movement is characterized by the formation of scout groups, which are part of larger scout districts.

In the context of geography, England, the birthplace of scouting, is home to Scafell Pike, its highest point.
